Authored by Gemini 3.1 Pro (Antigravity). Session d1aee218-8c42-4562-b2ec-f597284fa9d7.

FAIR-band: in-band [N/30]

Resolves #11533

## Summary

Codifies the "PR Diff === PR Body" mental model with the minimum viable Map-tier entry in `AGENTS.md`:

```md
## 13.3. PR Diff === PR Body
See Atlas §13.3: graph-ingestion parity.
```

Adds the full explanatory memory anchor to `learn/agentos/AGENTS_ATLAS.md` §13.3, keeping always-loaded `AGENTS.md` compact while preserving the graph-ingestion rationale for agents that need detail.

## Deltas From Ticket

The original ticket proposed compressing `AGENTS.md` §13.1 to offset the added §13.3 bytes. During review, operator and peer V-B-A corrected that shape: unrelated AGENTS.md compression is out of scope when a compact intent-preserving §13.3 line fits under the hard cap.

Final shape:
- `AGENTS.md`: adds only the compact §13.3 Map pointer.
- `AGENTS_ATLAS.md`: carries the detailed PR-body / review-template graph-ingestion explanation.
- No §13.1, §15.6, or §23 compression remains in this PR.

## Substrate Mutation Rationale

`AGENTS.md` is turn-loaded Map-tier substrate with a 24,576-byte hard cap. The new §13.3 entry needs per-turn discoverability because PR bodies and review templates feed the Retrospective daemon / Native Edge Graph; however, the explanatory prose belongs in Atlas-tier detail, not in the always-loaded Map.

Slot disposition:
- `AGENTS.md §13.3`: `keep` as compact Map-tier trigger.
- `AGENTS_ATLAS.md §13.3`: `keep` as Atlas-tier explanation and memory anchor.

## Evidence Declaration

Evidence: L1 (static substrate-shape and byte-count audit) -> L1 required (no runtime ACs). No residuals.

## Test Evidence

```bash
$ git diff origin/dev...origin/pr-11534 -- AGENTS.md learn/agentos/AGENTS_ATLAS.md
# AGENTS.md adds compact §13.3 pointer; AGENTS_ATLAS.md adds §13.3 detail.

$ git cat-file -s origin/pr-11534:AGENTS.md
24573

$ gh pr checks 11534
Analyze (javascript) pass
CodeQL pass
check-size pass
integration-unified pass
lint-pr-body pass
unit pass
```

## Post-Merge Validation

- [x] `AGENTS.md` remains under the 24,576-byte hard cap.
- [x] `check-size` passes.
- [x] Runtime CI is green (`unit`, `integration-unified`, CodeQL/Analyze).
